hero.description: No hidden fees. No surprise charges. Choose the plan that best fits your needs.

hobby.name: Hobby
hobby.desc: Perfect for side projects and learning.

pro.name: Pro
pro.desc: For professional developers and small teams.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most commonly asked questions about our plans and services.
faq.q_0: Can I cancel at any time?
faq.a_0: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. Your access remains active until the end of your billing period.
faq.a_1: We offer a 14-day free trial for the Pro plan. No credit card required to start.
faq.a_2: We accept major credit cards and PayPal. For Enterprise, we support bank transfers.
